creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
For rm@ (added to CC),
Patch attached to just fix the issue.  However, the second patch may be preferred as that fixes the issue by updating to the latest from upstream git.  That follows the precedence set a while back for compatibility with newer Ruby.  The port was also modernized as well per Poudriere testport warnings and is now Poudriere warnings clean.

Jason
